attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ,SHIP_CAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ,TAC.SR_NUMBER ,TAC.ORDER_NUMBER ,TAC.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER) + TAC_HDR.CCM_SSC_KEY AS SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY, 
 RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
 RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT,
 SHIP_CAL.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
 SHIP_CAL.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT,
 TAC.SR_NUMBER AS SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT,
 TAC.ORDER_NUMBER AS SRC_RPTD_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT,
 TAC.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER SRC_RPTD_PRDT_PART_NUM,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS  EDW_CREATE_USER
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CST_SSC_COGS  TAC
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID CNTL
 ON TAC.FISCAL_MONTH=CNTL.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY
 ON RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR SHIP_CAL
 ON SHIP_CAL.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME  = TAC.SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH,
 (SELECT COALESCE( MAX(SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY),0) CCM_SSC_KEY FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SR_SERVICE_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST) TAC_HDR
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SR_SERVICE_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST SMSSCC
         WHERE SMSSCC.BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
		 AND SMSSCC.BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
		 AND SMSSCC.BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT = SHIP_CAL.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
		 AND SMSSCC.BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT =  SHIP_CAL.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
         AND SMSSCC.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT = TAC.SR_NUMBER
         AND SMSSCC.SRC_RPTD_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT = TAC.ORDER_NUMBER
         AND SMSSCC.SRC_RPTD_PRDT_PART_NUM = TAC.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER)

SELECT
   QUARTER                    
 , FISCAL_MONTH_ID            
 , FISCAL_MONTH               
 , ORDER_NUMBER               
 , PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER        
 , SR_NUMBER                  
 , ORDER_SA_NUMBER            
 , SITE_THEATER               
 , SITE_COUNTRY               
 , SRVC_LINE                  
 , C3_MARKET_SEGMENT          
 , SRVC_OFFERING              
 , SRVC_CATEGORY              
 , C3_CUST_THEATER
 , HW_FAMILY            
 , HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY            
 , FAILURE_CODE 
 , WARRANTY_PARTS_PCT
 , CONTRACTED_SERVICE_GROUP      
 , QUANTITY_SHIPPED            
 , COUNTRY_CODE                 
 , CUSTOMER    
 , LOOKUP_THEATER            
 , ENT_PRODUCT_ID               
 , COVERED_PRODUCT_FAMILY   
 , ENT_PRODUCT_FAMILY            
 , SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH                            
 , SUM(EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST )       
 , SUM(ALLOCATED_COST )               
 , SUM(DEPT_COST)                  
 , SUM(DEPRECIATION_COST)          
 , SUM(REPAIR_COST)                
 , SUM(DUTY_VAT_COST)              
 , SUM(TPL_COST)                   
 , SUM(TPM_COST)                   
 , SUM(OEM_COST)                   
,SUM(DEPT_MERAKI_CREDIT) AS  DEPT_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,SUM(DEPR_ECO_CREDIT )   AS    DPRCTN_ECO_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,SUM(DEPR_MERAKI_CREDIT )    AS  DPRCTN_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT  
,SUM(REPAIR_ECO_CREDIT) AS REPAIR_ECO_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,SUM(DUTY_VAT_ECO_CREDIT )   AS DUTY_VAT_ECO_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,SUM(DUTY_VAT_MERAKI_CREDIT  )  AS DUTY_VAT_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT          
,SUM(TPL_ECO_CREDIT  ) AS TPL_ECO_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,SUM(TPL_MERAKI_CREDIT  ) AS TPL_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,SUM(OEM_MERAKI_CREDIT  ) AS OEM_MERAKI_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,RMA_CREDIT_FLG AS RMA_CREDIT_APPLIED_FLG
/*Addition of New Umpire Credit Amounts as part of JUN FY22 Release*/
,SUM(DEPR_UMPIRE_CREDIT) AS DPRCTN_UMPIRE_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,SUM(REPAIR_UMPIRE_CREDIT) AS REPAIR_UMPIRE_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,SUM(DUTY_VAT_UMPIRE_CREDIT) AS DUTY_VAT_UMPIRE_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,SUM(TPL_UMPIRE_CREDIT) AS TPL_UMPIRE_CREDIT_USD_AMT
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_EDW_SSC_COGS
WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
 GROUP BY                 
 QUARTER                    
 , FISCAL_MONTH_ID, FISCAL_MONTH , ORDER_NUMBER  , PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER , SR_NUMBER, ORDER_SA_NUMBER            
 , SITE_THEATER, SITE_COUNTRY , SRVC_LINE  , C3_MARKET_SEGMENT, SRVC_OFFERING , SRVC_CATEGORY              
 , C3_CUST_THEATER , HW_FAMILY  , HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY  , FAILURE_CODE 
 , WARRANTY_PARTS_PCT, CONTRACTED_SERVICE_GROUP, QUANTITY_SHIPPED, COUNTRY_CODE, CUSTOMER, LOOKUP_THEATER            
 , ENT_PRODUCT_ID, COVERED_PRODUCT_FAMILY   , ENT_PRODUCT_FAMILY, SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH,RMA_CREDIT_FLG
